fields.summary: Add recommissioning nodes to the list of updated nodes returned to the AM

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: YARN-6483 introduced nodes that transitioned to DECOMMISSIONING state to the list of updated nodes returned to the AM. This allows the Spark application master to gracefully decommission its containers on the decommissioning node. But if the node were to be recommissioned, the Spark application master would not be aware of this. We propose to add recommissioned node to the list of updated nodes sent to the AM when a recommission node transition occurs.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
